homePage.title: Home
homePage.description: Submit a subscription request to create a company account and start using the platform.

registerCompany.title: New company subscription request
registerCompany.description: This page is currently used to submit a request for creating a new company.

registerCompanyForm.tempNote: Temporary landing page for company subscription requests
registerCompanyForm.title: Create a new company
registerCompanyForm.description: Submit a request to create a new company and enable it to use the platform for shipment operations.

uploadImage.title: Upload Attachments
uploadImage.description: The maximum allowed file size is 2MB, and supported formats include .jpg, .png, and .pdf.

login.title: Login
login.description: Access your account to continue managing shipments and operations.

shipmentClientPage.title: Current order status and official tracking details
shipmentClientPage.description: A clear and organized view of the shipment status, route, and contact details in one page.

topSection.summary: Current route overview with shipment status and stop count.

timeline.title: Tracking timeline
timeline.description: Each station the shipment passes through, in order.
timeline.currentDescriptionWithNext: The shipment is here now, then heading to {nextPointName}.
timeline.currentDescriptionLast: The shipment has reached this station, and it is the last point in the route.
timeline.doneDescription: This station has been passed successfully.
timeline.upcomingDescription: The shipment has not reached this station yet.

header.title: Dashboard
header.description: An overview of platform activity with quick statistics for companies, subscriptions, visits, and notes.

header.title: Companies
header.description: Manage registered companies and their activation status

deleteCompanyDialog.title: Are you sure you want to delete the company {companyName}?
deleteCompanyDialog.description: The company {companyName} will be permanently deleted.

add.title: Add New Company
add.description: Create a new company to enable it to use the system and manage its shipping operations.

edit.title: Edit Company
edit.description: Edit company details and activation status. Any changes will be applied immediately to all users of the company.

add.title: Add Subscription Plan
add.description: Create a new subscription plan, set the price and duration in months to be used when adding companies.

edit.title: Edit Subscription Plan
edit.description: Edit current subscription plan details. Changes will be applied to the plan data in the system.

hints.duration: Subscription duration is saved in months, e.g., 1 for monthly and 12 for yearly subscription.
hints.price: The price is used when linking the plan to companies.

deleteDialog.title: Are you sure you want to delete the plan {subscriptionType}?
deleteDialog.description: The plan {subscriptionType} will be permanently deleted if it is not linked to any company.

dialog.title: Add New Note
dialog.description: Send a new note to the platform administration to share an inquiry, request, complaint, or any details related to the service or system.

header.title: Subscription Requests
header.description: Pending activation and plan change requests from companies.

pending.title: Pending Requests
pending.description: Number of pending subscription activation requests.

change.title: Plan Change Requests
change.description: Number of pending plan change requests.

total.title: Total Requests
total.description: Total number of subscription related requests.

adminSubscriptionRequestPage.noPendingMessage: There are no pending subscription or plan change requests at the moment.

expirePage.title: Company Subscription Expired
expirePage.description: Your company account is temporarily suspended until the subscription is renewed or the plan is updated.

card.title: Your Subscription Has Expired
card.description: Please renew your subscription to regain access to the dashboard and company data.

alert.title: Access Locked Until Renewal
alert.description: The current subscription is no longer valid, and platform services are unavailable until it is renewed.

steps.step1: Review available subscription details on the My Subscription page.
steps.step2: Choose the most suitable plan and start the renewal process.
steps.step3: After renewal, all company features will be automatically restored.

info.title: Note
info.text: If you need assistance with renewal, you can visit the subscription page or contact support.

statusCard.title: Account Status
statusCard.description: Dashboard features are unavailable until renewal.

solution.title: Suggested Solution
solution.text: Go to My Subscription page to renew your plan or switch to a new one.

pendingPage.title: Your Company is Under Review
pendingPage.description: Your company data has been successfully received, and the subscription request is currently being reviewed by our team.

card.title: Subscription Request Under Review
card.description: Our support team is reviewing your company data to ensure all information is accurate.

alert.title: We appreciate your patience.
alert.description: Verification may take some time. You will be notified once the review is completed or if additional information is required.

steps.step1: Reviewing company data and subscription information.
steps.step2: Verifying required documents and attachments if any.
steps.step3: Approving the account to activate the company again.

info.title: Tip
info.text: If you have any questions or need to update information, you can return to the subscription page or contact support at any time.

statusCard.title: Expected Review
statusCard.description: No action is required at the moment, and we will notify you of any updates.

current.title: Current Status
current.text: The request is currently under review by the support team.

expected.title: Expected Time
expected.text: A response will be provided within 24 business hours or less.

inactivePage.title: Your Account Has Been Disabled
inactivePage.description: Your account has been temporarily deactivated. You cannot access the dashboard or perform any actions until it is reactivated.

card.title: Your Account is Inactive
card.description: Your company account has been disabled by the administrative team.

alert.title: Don’t worry, we will help you reactivate it.
alert.description: If you believe this is a mistake, you can contact support or review your subscription status for more details.

reasons.reason1: Company data is under administrative review.
reasons.reason2: Subscription expired or payment not completed.
reasons.reason3: Violation or incompatibility with terms of service.

info.title: What can you do now?
info.text: Check your email for any instructions, or contact support to reactivate your account as soon as possible.

statusCard.title: Account Disabled
statusCard.description: You cannot make any changes or access resources until the account is reactivated.

current.title: Current Status
current.text: The account is temporarily inactive and all permissions are disabled.

nextSteps.title: Next Steps
nextSteps.text: Contact support or your administration team to reactivate your account and restore access.

page.title: Shipments
page.description: View and manage all active shipments in the system, track their status and updates.

page.title: Finished Shipments
page.description: View shipments that have been completed or closed, including final status and full tracking history.

add.title: Add New Shipment
add.description: Register a new shipment and assign driver and route to start tracking.

edit.title: Edit Shipment
edit.description: Update shipment details and tracking information.

pause.title: Pause Shipment
pause.description: Are you sure you want to pause this shipment?

resume.title: Resume Shipment
resume.description: Are you sure you want to resume this shipment?

delete.title: Delete Shipment
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete this shipment? This action cannot be undone.
